propositions: When main advances, signed plan-review attestations for a byte-identical plan read stale and trigger a full un-floored re-review, exposed to measured same-material verdict instability.
The convergence floors do not cover drift-only-stale re-reviews because their eligibility requires code-unchanged plus plan-changed, which is the complement of this scenario.

Progressive drift-refresh should default to True so a drift-only-stale re-review runs a scoped E4+G1G2 grounding probe instead of the full criteria set, refreshing the attestation when the plan still holds.
Setting progressive_drift_refresh explicitly to false must restore the full re-review path.
Stale default-off framing about drift-refresh must be removed from src, tests, and docs except dated ADR notes.
The token/latency saving of a drift-refresh probe versus a full re-review must be measured on a representative fixture and recorded.
